summary: Completed testing of Relationship Feed feature on contact detail page. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified showing: Relationship Feed section, Log Customer Reply button, INBOUND badges for customer replies, CUSTOMER badges for customer activity, and Suggested Actions (Next Actions) section.

minor.issue: Returns 500 for malformed ObjectId instead of 400/422 - should validate ObjectId format before DB query

ui_bugs.issue: Session not persisted when navigating directly to /contact/{id} URL - requires login flow first then navigation

backend.GET /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/s: PASS - Returns actions array with type, title, icon, color, action fields
PASS - Returns empty actions array for non-existent contact
backend.POST /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/: PASS - Creates customer_reply event with direction=inbound
PASS - Returns 400 with proper error message
backend.GET /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/e: PASS - Returns events with customer_reply type and direction=inbound
backend.GET /api/showcase/feedback-photo/{feedba: PASS - Returns error for malformed ID
backend.Existing customer reply verification: PASS - Found existing reply 'Hey Forest, thanks so much! My buddy Mike wants to check out some cars too.'

frontend.contact_detail_page_loads: PASS - Contact page at /contact/{id} loads correctly after login flow
frontend.relationship_feed_section: PASS - 'RELATIONSHIP FEED' header visible with event count
frontend.log_customer_reply_button: PASS - 'Log Customer Reply' button visible in green with chat icon
frontend.inbound_badge: PASS - Customer Reply events display INBOUND badge in green
frontend.customer_badge: PASS - Customer activity events (card views, shares) display CUSTOMER badge
frontend.suggested_actions_section: PASS - 'NEXT ACTIONS' section visible with suggested actions
frontend.quick_actions_bar: PASS - SMS, Call, Email, Review, Card, Congrats buttons visible
frontend.stats_row: PASS - Shows TOUCHES, MESSAGES, CAMPAIGNS, REFERRALS counts
frontend.voice_notes_section: PASS - Voice notes section with transcript visible

action_items: Consider adding ObjectId validation in feedback-photo endpoint before DB query to return 400 instead of 500 for malformed IDs

verified_features.relationship_feed: Activity feed renamed to 'Relationship Feed' with all touchpoints
verified_features.log_customer_reply: Button visible, API creates customer_reply events with direction=inbound
verified_features.suggested_actions: NEXT ACTIONS section shows birthday/anniversary/follow-up recommendations
verified_features.inbound_badge: Customer replies show green INBOUND badge
verified_features.customer_badge: Customer-initiated activities (card views, shares, reviews) show CUSTOMER badge

seed_data_creation: Created test customer reply via API during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Relationship Feed feature fully tested. Contact detail page requires login flow before direct URL navigation. The test contact (Forest Ward - 69a0c06f7626f14d125f8c34) has 50+ events including multiple customer_reply events with INBOUND badge. The jimmy contact (69a4a25cfa75497baf35242e) has 2 events including a review with CUSTOMER badge and a birthday card. Suggested actions appear based on contact data (birthday, anniversary, last contact date).
